pr_body:
Fixes several issues found during review.

Changes:
- Import missing utilities in runner_core to prevent NameError during result zip creation and notifications.
- Wire up install_requirements and pip_* options (per-job pip install into work/_deps, adds to PYTHONPATH).
- Wire up cleanup_min_free_mb (best-effort deletion of oldest finished jobs when disk is low).
- Fix duplicate ip_in_cidrs definition in utils.
- Preserve newest-first job ordering across restarts.
- Update version documentation checks to follow config.yaml.
- Add a GitHub Actions job to run pytest.

Verification:
- python -m pytest -q (75 passed)
pr_title: Fix runner_core completion crashes, utils duplication, and add CI tests
